name: K8s Deployment Rollout Status Report
description: Enumerate every deployment in a Kubernetes namespace via the live openagentic_kubernetes.k8s_list_deployments MCP, classify each one as healthy / rolling-out / stuck / scaled-zero based on the replicas-vs-ready-vs-available triple, filter the non-healthy subset sorted by severity, ask the platform LLM for a 2-3 bullet operator narrative on the most concerning rollout situations, strip any chain-of-thought preamble, then render an HTML rollout status report via webhook_response with per-deployment ready/desired counts plus the narrative. All-healthy case (the operational default in stable clusters) is handled — the report explicitly says "All N deployments healthy" instead of rendering a blank table.

meta.purpose: Enumerate every deployment in a namespace, classify by rollout state (healthy / rolling-out / stuck / scaled-zero), and produce an HTML status report with LLM narrative on the concerning ones.
how_it_works: 2. A classify transform inspects each deployment's replicas / readyReplicas / availableReplicas triple and assigns a state: healthy / rolling_out / stuck / scaled_zero.
3. A filter transform keeps only the non-healthy subset, sorted by severity.
4. The platform LLM writes 2-3 bullets focused on the most concerning rollout situations.
5. A CoT-stripper transform removes any LLM preamble.

6. webhook_response renders the HTML report with per-deployment ready/desired counts. All-healthy short-circuit: when no deployments are concerning, the report says 'All N deployments healthy' instead of an empty table.
meta.expected_output: HTML rollout status report with per-deployment ready/desired counts, state badges, and a 2-3 bullet LLM narrative on the concerning rollouts.
meta.useful_when: Right after a Helm upgrade, before/after Argo syncs, or in the daily 'is the cluster stable?' digest.

operations.value: {{ (() => { let deps = []; if (Array.isArray(input.deployments)) { deps = input.deployments; } else if (typeof input.content === 'string') { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(input.content); if (Array.isArray(parsed.deployments)) deps = parsed.deployments; } catch (e) {} } return deps.map(d => { if (!d) return null; const desired = (typeof d.replicas === 'number') ? d.replicas : 0; const ready = (typeof d.ready_replicas === 'number') ? d.ready_replicas : 0; const available = (typeof d.available_replicas === 'number') ? d.available_replicas : 0; const updated = (typeof d.updated_replicas === 'number') ? d.updated_replicas : 0; const unavailable = Math.max(0, desired - available); let status; if (desired === 0) { status = 'scaled-zero'; } else if (ready === desired && available >= desired && unavailable === 0) { status = 'healthy'; } else if (available > 0 && ready < desired) { status = 'rolling-out'; } else if (available === 0) { status = 'stuck'; } else { status = 'rolling-out'; } return { name: String(d.name || ''), namespace: String(d.namespace || ''), desired: desired, ready: ready, available: available, updated: updated, unavailable: unavailable, status: status, created: String(d.created || '') }; }).filter(x => x !== null); })() }}

{{ (() => { if (typeof input.namespace === 'string' && input.namespace) return input.namespace; if (typeof input.content === 'string') { try { return JSON.parse(input.content).namespace || 'unknown'; } catch (e) {} } return 'unknown'; })() }}

{{ (() => { if (Array.isArray(input.deployments)) return input.deployments.length; if (typeof input.content === 'string') { try { const d = JSON.parse(input.content).deployments; return Array.isArray(d) ? d.length : 0; } catch (e) { return 0; } } return 0; })() }}
{{ (() => { const c = Array.isArray(input.classified) ? input.classified : []; return c.filter(d => d && d.status === 'healthy').length; })() }}
{{ (() => { const c = Array.isArray(input.classified) ? input.classified : []; return c.filter(d => d && d.status !== 'healthy').length; })() }}

{{ (() => { const c = Array.isArray(input.classified) ? input.classified : []; if (c.length === 0) return 'No deployments found in namespace.'; const esc = s => String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/&/g, '&').replace(//g, '>'); return c.map(d => `${esc(d.name)}${esc(d.status)}${d.ready}/${d.desired}${d.available}${esc(d.created).replace('T', ' ').replace('Z', '')}`).join(''); })() }}

{{ (() => { const total = input.total_count || 0; const unhealthy = input.unhealthy_count || 0; if (total === 0) return '

No deployments found in this namespace.

'; if (unhealthy === 0) return `

All ${total} deployments healthy — replicas matching ready and available counts across the namespace.

`; return ''; })() }}

{{ (() => { const c = Array.isArray(input.classified) ? input.classified : []; const rank = { 'stuck': 3, 'rolling-out': 2, 'scaled-zero': 1, 'healthy': 0 }; const filtered = c.filter(d => d && d.status !== 'healthy'); filtered.sort((a, b) => (rank[b.status] || 0) - (rank[a.status] || 0)); return filtered; })() }}

data.label: Operator Narrative
data.prompt:
You are an SRE summarizing the rollout state of Kubernetes deployments in namespace {{steps.analyze.namespace_label}}.

Non-healthy deployments (JSON array, sorted by severity desc — stuck before rolling-out before scaled-zero; may be empty):
{{steps.unhealthy.unhealthy}}

Total deployments scanned: {{steps.analyze.total_count}} ({{steps.analyze.healthy_count}} healthy, {{steps.analyze.unhealthy_count}} non-healthy).

Output rules (MUST follow):
1. Start the response with a single `-` character — no preamble, no "Here is", no "The user wants", no thinking out loud.
2. Exactly 2 to 3 short bullets, each on its own line, each beginning with `-`.
3. Each bullet references ONE deployment by name verbatim with its status and ready/desired counts, plus a concrete operator next-action hint (e.g. check pod events, verify image tag, inspect rollout history).
4. If the unhealthy array is empty, emit a single bullet stating all deployments are healthy and recommend a routine future check.

data.label: HTML Rollout Status Report
data.bodyTemplate:
K8s Deployment Rollout Status — namespace {{steps.analyze.namespace_label}}

Total deployments: {{steps.analyze.total_count}} · Healthy: {{steps.analyze.healthy_count}} · Non-healthy: {{steps.analyze.unhealthy_count}}

{{steps.analyze.all_healthy_banner}}

Operator Narrative

{{steps.clean_narrative.clean_content}}

Per-Deployment Status

{{steps.analyze.rows_html}}
DeploymentStatusReady / DesiredAvailableCreated

Non-Healthy Deployments (sorted by severity)

{{steps.unhealthy.unhealthy}}
